name: JoAi: Query Store Data

description.en: Query and view entries from a tracked data store with optional date filters.
description.de: Einträge eines Datenspeichers abfragen und mit optionalen Datumsfiltern anzeigen.
description.es: Query and view entries from a tracked data store with optional date filters.
description.fr: Query and view entries from a tracked data store with optional date filters.
description.ro: Query and view entries from a tracked data store with optional date filters.
description.it: Query and view entries from a tracked data store with optional date filters.

bot: Use this when the user wants to see their tracked data, check progress, view history, or look up past entries in a store.

inputs.name: Store Name

description.en: The name of the store to query
description.es: The name of the store to query
description.fr: The name of the store to query
description.ro: The name of the store to query
description.it: The name of the store to query

inputs.bot: The exact name of the store to query.

inputs.name: Since
inputs.bot: Optional start date filter. Convert to ISO 8601 format before submitting.

inputs.name: Until
inputs.bot: Optional end date filter. Convert to ISO 8601 format before submitting.

inputs.name: Last N

description.en: Return only the last N entries
description.de: Nur die letzten N Einträge zurückgeben
description.es: Return only the last N entries
description.fr: Return only the last N entries
description.ro: Return only the last N entries
description.it: Return only the last N entries

inputs.bot: Optional number to return only the most recent N entries.
